name: count colors
function 2
PRO Dashboard CSS
format:
<style>
:root {
  --bg-0: #08101a;
  --bg-1: #0e1623;
  --bg-2: #111c2b;
  --panel-border: #24364c;
  --panel-soft: rgba(85, 118, 156, 0.18);
  --panel-stroke: rgba(93, 169, 255, 0.10);
  --text-main: #eef4ff;
  --text-soft: #9db1cb;
  --text-dim: #7f97b4;
  --success: #39d98a;
  --shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
}
body,
.nr-dashboard-theme,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-content,
.nr-dashboard-theme ui-view,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(76, 201, 240, 0.10), transparent 26%),
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(57, 217, 138, 0.08), transparent 24%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #07101a 0%, #0b1420 46%, #101927 100%) !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-family: Bahnschrift, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  padding: 16px 18px 28px !important;
  max-width: 1700px !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardcontainer {
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  padding: 0 7px 10px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar,
.nr-dashboard-theme .md-toolbar-tools {
  background: rgba(8, 16, 26, 0.94) !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(93, 169, 255, 0.14) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .md-toolbar-tools {
  font-family: Bahnschrift, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-card {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(17, 28, 43, 0.98) 0%, rgba(13, 22, 35, 0.98) 100%) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border) !important;
  border-radius: 20px !important;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow) !important;
  margin-bottom: 18px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 18px 22px 10px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-template,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-text,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-button,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-textinput {
  background: transparent !important;
}
.pro-card {
  min-height: 76px !important;
  margin: 8px 0 !important;
  padding: 15px 16px !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-soft) !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(23, 36, 54, 0.92) 0%, rgba(16, 26, 40, 0.96) 100%) !important;
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.02) !important;
}
.pro-card p,
.pro-card .label,
.pro-card .value {
  margin: 0 !important;
}
.pro-card .label {
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.10em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  margin-bottom: 8px !important;
}
.pro-card .value {
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 22px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  line-height: 1.15 !important;
}
.pro-hw .value,
.pro-status .value {
  font-size: 21px !important;
}
.pro-count {
  min-height: 108px !important;
  padding: 18px 14px !important;
}
.pro-count .label {
  font-size: 11px !important;
  margin-bottom: 10px !important;
}
.pro-count .value {
  font-size: 34px !important;
}
.count-red {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(73, 24, 31, 0.96) 0%, rgba(43, 17, 22, 0.98) 100%) !important;
  border-color: rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.28) !important;
}
.count-red .label,
.count-red .value {
  color: #ffd9d9 !important;
}
.count-yellow {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(73, 56, 17, 0.96) 0%, rgba(45, 34, 12, 0.98) 100%) !important;
  border-color: rgba(245, 196, 81, 0.30) !important;
}
.count-yellow .label,
.count-yellow .value {
  color: #fff0c4 !important;
}
.count-blue {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(24, 48, 83, 0.96) 0%, rgba(16, 30, 55, 0.98) 100%) !important;
  border-color: rgba(93, 169, 255, 0.28) !important;
}
.count-blue .label,
.count-blue .value {
  color: #d8ecff !important;
}
.pro-btn {
  padding: 6px 4px !important;
}
.pro-btn button {
  min-height: 58px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06) !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  color: #f6fbff !important;
  font-family: Bahnschrift, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif !important;
  font-size: 13px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em !important;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24) !important;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.btn-start button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1f8f59 0%, #14633d 100%) !important; }
.btn-stop button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c64545 0%, #8f2e2e 100%) !important; }
.btn-status button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #335f9e 0%, #274779 100%) !important; }
.btn-reverse button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7254d7 0%, #4d34a1 100%) !important; }
.btn-qtest button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d37d24 0%, #9c5817 100%) !important; }
.btn-pick button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #18837d 0%, #0e5a55 100%) !important; }
.pro-section-spacer {
  height: 12px;
}
.pro-panel-gap {
  display: block;
}
.pro-log-template {
  display: block;
  padding-top: 8px !important;
}
.pro-log-shell {
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 16, 24, 0.96) 0%, rgba(6, 11, 18, 0.98) 100%);
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
}
.pro-log-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(54, 80, 109, 0.6);
  background: rgba(17, 28, 43, 0.90);
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.pro-log-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  color: var(--text-soft);
}
.pro-log-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--success);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(57, 217, 138, 0.9);
}
.pro-log-body {
  height: 430px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  background: transparent;
  color: #dce7f5;
  padding: 18px;
  font-family: 'Cascadia Code', Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.58;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}
.pro-log-body::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 10px; }
.pro-log-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: rgba(93, 169, 255, 0.22);
  border-radius: 999px;
}
.pro-manual-input {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 14px !important;
}
.pro-manual-input md-input-container {
  margin: 0 !important;
  min-height: 58px;
  padding: 10px 14px 4px !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border) !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(17, 28, 43, 0.94) 0%, rgba(13, 22, 35, 0.98) 100%) !important;
}
.pro-manual-input label {
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
}
.pro-manual-input input {
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-family: 'Cascadia Code', Consolas, monospace !important;
  font-size: 15px !important;
}
.pro-manual-input .md-errors-spacer {
  min-height: 0 !important;
}
.esp32-tile {
  min-height: 82px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(57, 217, 138, 0.20);
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(19, 35, 33, 0.95) 0%, rgba(13, 23, 24, 0.98) 100%);
  padding: 16px 18px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.esp32-tile .eyebrow {
  color: #9de7c3;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.esp32-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
}
.esp32-state {
  color: #effff7;
  font-size: 23px;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.esp32-dot {
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: inline-block;
}
@media (max-width: 1450px) {
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
    padding: 14px 14px 24px !important;
  }
  .pro-log-body {
    height: 340px !important;
  }
  .pro-card .value {
    font-size: 20px !important;
  }
  .pro-count .value {
    font-size: 30px !important;
  }
}
</style>

format:
